name: Result

query.description: Required if `run` is not provided. Returns all results for the squid.
Required if `squid` is not provided. Returns all results for the run.
Optional: filter results to a specific task.

request.description:
This endpoint retrieves a paginated list of results produced by a **squid**.

> You must supply **either** the squid hash **or** a specific run hash—**not both**.  
Optionally, you can also filter those results to a single task within the run. 
  

### Query Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **squid** | string | one-of\* | — | Hash of the squid. Returns **all** results produced by that squid (across runs) **if** `run` is omitted. |
| **run** | string | one-of\* | — | Hash of the run. Returns results from **that single execution**. Required if `squid` is omitted. |
| **task** | string | no | — | Optional. Hash of the task. Filters the results (within the chosen squid/run scope) to just that task. |
| **page** | integer | no | `1` | Page number to fetch (1-indexed). |
| **page_size** | integer | no | `50` | Number of results per page (max 100). |

\*Exactly **one** of `squid` or `run` must be provided.

> **Note:** Different squids/crawlers return different sets of result fields (see the Google Maps Reviews example below for one crawler’s schema). 
  

### Pagination Metadata

Every paginated response includes these top-level fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **total_results** | integer | Total number of result records available for this run. |
| **limit** | integer | The `page_size` you requested (or the default if you didn’t). |
| **page** | integer | The page number you requested. |
| **total_pages** | integer | `ceil(total_results / limit)`—how many pages of data exist. |
| **result_from** | integer | 1-based index of the first record in this page (e.g. `(page−1)\\\\\\*limit + 1`). |
| **result_to** | integer | 1-based index of the last record in this page (e.g. `min(page\\\\\\*limit, total_results)`). |
| **next** | string | Full URL to fetch the next page, or `null` if you’re on the last page. |
| **previous** | string | Full URL to fetch the previous page, or `null` if you’re on the first page. |
| **data** | array | Array of result objects. |

Use `next` (or increment `page`) to page through all results until `next` is `null`.

- **data** array holds up to `limit` result objects.
    
- The schema of each object (fields beyond the pagination metadata) varies by squid/crawler.
